assertions.title: Import → API — Imported data queryable with identifiers and relationships

steps.action: Import isolated Linear-style fixture via CLI import
steps.expected: Imported data available through GraphQL API
steps.observed: Import completed with 3 issues, 3 comments, 1 parent-child link

steps.action: Query imported SON issues through GraphQL
steps.expected: Imported identifiers, labels, children, and comments are returned
steps.observed: API returned SON-42, SON-43, and SON-44 with expected labels, child link SON-42→SON-44, and comments for SON-42

evidence.network: POST /graphql -> 200; see import/api-flow/issues_overview.request.json and issues_overview.response.json plus import-command-output.txt

steps.expected: Export contains 3 issues
steps.observed: Export contains 3 issues

steps.action: Run import verify for the fixture
steps.expected: Verify reports issue export/db counts match
steps.observed: Verify reported Issues (export: 3, db: 3) PASS

steps.expected: SON-42, SON-43, SON-44 present in export
steps.observed: Export identifiers are SON-42, SON-43, SON-44

steps.expected: Same identifiers returned unchanged
steps.observed: API returned SON-42, SON-43, SON-44

steps.expected: SON-42 is parent of SON-44
steps.observed: Export mapping lists SON-42 -> SON-44

steps.expected: SON-42.children includes SON-44
steps.observed: API children for SON-42: SON-44

steps.expected: Comments are ordered by createdAt ascending
steps.observed: Export order is Looking into this now then Found the root cause

steps.action: Query comments(orderBy: createdAt) for imported SON-42
steps.expected: GraphQL returns same chronological order
steps.observed: API order is Looking into this now then Found the root cause

steps.action: Run import verify scoped to fixture export
steps.expected: All entity mappings are complete and unique for issues/users
steps.observed: Verify passed for Users, Issues, and Comments with export/db parity

steps.expected: Imported counts align with export counts for mappable entities
steps.observed: Import summary reported 2 users, 3 issues, 3 comments, 1 parent-child link

steps.action: Import fixture containing team EMP with zero issues
steps.expected: Import succeeds without error
steps.observed: Import summary included 2 teams and completed successfully

steps.expected: Empty team is returned and queryable
steps.observed: API returned Empty Team

assertions.title: Edge case — issues without assignee or labels

steps.expected: assignee null and labels empty
steps.observed: Export SON-43 has null assignee and [] labels

steps.expected: assignee is null and labels.nodes is []
steps.observed: API assignee=None, labels=[]

assertions.title: Issue timestamp preservation

steps.action: Compare export issue timestamps against GraphQL API fields
steps.expected: API should expose createdAt/updatedAt for imported issues
steps.observed: Current GraphQL Issue type does not expose createdAt or updatedAt fields on the real API surface

steps.expected: Alternative surface should directly prove timestamp preservation via API-correlated evidence
steps.observed: CLI import verify output does not include issue timestamp values, so API-only proof could not be completed

evidence.network: schema.ts shows Issue fields omit timestamps; import-verify-output.txt

assertions.issues: Blocked by API schema not exposing issue createdAt/updatedAt, preventing direct real-surface verification.

assertions.title: User data preservation

steps.action: Compare export users.json names/emails against GraphQL API
steps.expected: API should provide a user query or imported issue coverage for all imported users
steps.observed: API exposes User only through assignee/comment.user fields and has no root users query

steps.expected: All imported users should be provable through API
steps.observed: Alice and Bob are visible through issue assignee/comment data, but the API cannot directly enumerate imported users for complete assertion evidence

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing GraphQL user query; complete imported-user preservation cannot be proven through the assigned API surface alone.

blockers.description: The live GraphQL Issue type does not expose createdAt/updatedAt fields, so VAL-IMP-010 cannot be proven through the assigned API surface.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried schema and reviewed import verify evidence, but neither exposed issue timestamps via API-correlated output.

blockers.description: The live GraphQL schema has no root user query, preventing complete API-surface enumeration of all imported users for VAL-IMP-011.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried imported issues/comments to recover visible users, but no API route exists to prove full imported-user coverage.

setupKnowledge: No CLI fixture existed at .factory/validation/import/user-testing/tmp/cli-flow, so an isolated equivalent fixture was created under .factory/validation/import/user-testing/tmp/api-flow and imported with the built CLI.
The live API on localhost:4200 was healthy and accepted Authorization: Bearer changeme-set-your-token.
Import verification succeeded for the isolated fixture before GraphQL checks were run.
summary: Tested 10 assertions: 8 passed, 2 blocked (timestamps and full user preservation not directly provable through current API schema).
